who: logistics coordinators for freight brokers processing 10–20 deliveries/week
offer: For logistics coordinators processing 10–20 deliveries/week, inefficient truck loading causes late deliveries. We automate loading optimization and manifest generation instead of manual loading optimization and paper-based manifest creation.
problem: Inefficient truck loading leading to delays in delivery schedules.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics coordinators
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to logistics coordinators with demo video
Community forums for sharing logistics tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for delivery details and loading suggestions on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
